prose.en: Monitor the use of maintenance tools that execute with increased privilege.

guidance.en: Maintenance tools that execute with increased system privilege can result in unauthorized access to organizational information and assets that would otherwise be inaccessible.

prose.en: the use of maintenance tools that execute with increased privilege is monitored.

objects.en: system maintenance tools and associated documentation
list of personnel authorized to use maintenance tools
Organizational personnel with system maintenance responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Organizational processes for restricting the use of maintenance tools
organizational process for monitoring maintenance tools and maintenance tool usage
mechanisms monitoring the use of maintenance tools
